edge_definitions.name: Geopolitical Mispricing
edge_definitions.description: Markets overreact to geopolitical threats. Strait of Hormuz never closed, Taiwan Strait never escalated — but fear gets priced in every time. Mean reversion opportunity when others panic.
edge_definitions.trigger: Geopolitical crisis drives selloff beyond fundamental impact

edge_definitions.name: Second-Order Causation
edge_definitions.description: Don't watch the event. Watch who gains power from the event, what they'll do, and how that shifts supply/demand.

edge_definitions.name: Catalyst Window
edge_definitions.description: Improving fundamentals are necessary. A near-term catalyst (earnings, conference, policy) is sufficient. Both at once = optimal entry.
edge_definitions.trigger: Fundamental improvement + upcoming catalyst within 30 days

coingecko.note: Free tier works (10-30 calls/min). Add pro key for higher limits.

etherscan.note: Free tier: 5 calls/sec. Get key at etherscan.io/apis
